svg.title: Corrected esp32-evse state machine
svg.desc: State diagram: idle state A; session levels B, C and D, each split into a paused sub-state 1 and an active sub-state 2; fault state E shown as a dashed overlay reachable from any state; and unavailable state F. Colour shows whether current flows: grey is no current, teal is PWM offered with no current, green is charging.
svg.text: Sub-state 1 = contactor open (+12 V) · 2 = PWM applied · 1↔2 toggles on “charging allowed”
